parameters: マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = 2F_Orig
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = 2F_Orig

...Come to think of it, around here... Found it, the Hero-sama's book. It was buried
in the trash during cleaning, so I cleaned it up and put it back on the shelf.

...That brings back memories. Back when I couldn't read, I used to ask Mana to read
this book to me all the time...

Even though it's a story for children, Mana would happily read it to me right beside
me...

This is the closet Elly used to let me use, back before we were given our own house.
There's nothing much in it now.

This is the closet I used to borrow before we were given our own house. There's
nothing much in it now.

The bed is surprisingly well-kept. Even after the village chief's wife passed away,
someone must be maintaining this place.
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = FL_Bed
...I don't wanna sleep in such a creaky, noisy place...

Elly cleaned up the book I found in that pile of garbage. It seems to be mainly about
cooking and sewing.

From the junk in the room, Elly pulled up things that still seemed usable onto the
shelf ...... I might have just thrown it all away.

It's the teddy bear that Grandma cherished dearly. It seems she was unable to have
children of her own, so the Village Chief had been accepting outsiders like us all
this time.

And to every child who came to this house, she would give this teddy bear. So that
they would never feel lonely in this home again. Grandma's kind feelings are poured
into this doll.

There are a few clothes inside that my grandmother used to wear. No one will ever
wear them again, but even so, that girl hid them here so they wouldn't be thrown
away.
